title: Cash/platform bounty scout: 10 candidates rejected at preflight
channel: GitHub issue + fork PR + platform claim/comment

evidence.summary: NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora bot $10 cash/platform-looking bounty. Open/no assignee and small FastAPI scope, but acceptance requires `.generation_meta.json` with full startup instructions/context. System/developer prompt disclosure is blocked. Prior comments show competing attempts; no coding/PR.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora bot $15 cash/platform-looking bounty. Open/no assignee and small code scope, but `_provenance.json` requires boot context/all instructions. This is system-prompt disclosure. Multiple existing attempts; no implementation.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora bot $15 cash/platform-looking bounty. Micro-bounty amount is acceptable, but `_meta.json` requires generation context/platform prompt. Existing attempt comments already present. Blocked before /attempt/PR.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora bot $35 cash/platform-looking bounty. Small T3 CLI scope, but `.contributor.json` requires complete first-message/context disclosure. Also several claim/attempt comments. Blocked.

NO-GO / HIGH_RISK — Algora bot $20 cash/platform-looking bounty. Attractive micro-task, but `.audit.json` requires full initialization payload including behavioral rules. That is prohibited prompt disclosure; existing attempts also crowd the issue.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — IssueHunt badge $5 funded. Open and funded, but a full server/commons/client PR chain is already posted in comments. Requires client-side coordination; duplicate/low approval odds.
NO-GO / PAYMENT_UNCLEAR — IssueHunt funding cancelled after prior PR. Issue body/bot history shows funding was cancelled and maintainer says repo/funding is no longer managed. No payout route.
NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora $150. Open but assigned to piercypixel and active attempts by multiple contributors. Core-team assignment required. Do not implement without assignment.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora $25. Open/no current assignee, but bot table shows many rewarded/closed PRs and current WIP attempts. Maintainer assignment flow and saturated history make approval odds poor.

NO-GO / DUPLICATE — Algora/issue bounty labels, $200+ style coverage task. Open, but comments/PR search show high-volume coverage bounty competition and many existing PRs. Rust test target selection/build burden too high for quick safe scout.

decision_history.summary: cash/platform bounty/direct-payout 후보 10개 검색 및 preflight 확인.
UnsafeLabs 후보 5개는 full prompt/context disclosure 요구로 자동 PR 금지.
나머지는 경쟁/할당/중복 PR 또는 지급취소로 구현 가치 없음.
시스템 프롬프트 공개, 지급 불명확, 중복 PR crowding이 승인/지급 가능성을 차단.
GO 후보 없음; 신규 기대 순수익 0.

next_action: 다음 scout는 prompt/context disclosure를 요구하지 않는 verified cash/platform micro-bounty를 우선 검색.
